GO_DESCRIPTION_TEXT: A Group Order (GO) allows fans worldwide to bundle their purchases into a single bulk shipment. This reduces international shipping costs significantly and ensures you can secure limited items safely through CirclePort's mediation.
You do not have permission to access thi: You do not have permission to access this private project.
GO_COST_ADVANTAGE_DESC: By joining this GO, the domestic shipping cost from the creator to our Japan warehouse is shared among all participants. This significantly reduces the initial cost compared to buying individually.
INDIVIDUAL_SHIPPING_DESC: Shipped directly from our Japan warehouse to your home. While international shipping isn't shared, you benefit from near-zero 'Japan domestic shipping' via GO, and save 100% on local delivery and organizer fees.
BULK_SHIPPING_DESC: The organizer receives all items and forwards them to you. You share both Japan domestic and international shipping costs, making it the cheapest option, though local delivery and organizer fees will apply.
Note: Local delivery fees in your countr: Note: Local delivery fees and organizer handling fees are waived for this mode.
